summary: Mission Control domain foundation is correctly implemented. Core types (Mission, Milestone, Feature, Assertion, Checkpoint) are properly defined with TypeScript enums for statuses. Zod validators include referential integrity checks, cyclic dependency detection, and transition guards. Mission ID generation follows the YYYY-MM-DD-NNN pattern. State machine transitions use guard functions that throw MaestroError with helpful hints. All 4 test files provide comprehensive coverage.
